words.label: Words
words.description: Enter the words you want to type out. Place each word or phrase on a new line.

typing_speed.label: Typing Speed (ms)
typing_speed.description: Set the typing speed in milliseconds. Lower numbers mean faster typing (e.g., 50 for fast, 120 for normal).

pause_time.label: Pause Time (ms)
pause_time.description: How long to wait before deleting the word and typing the next one (e.g., 2000 = 2 seconds).

text_color.label: Text Color
text_color.description: Choose the color of the animated typewriter text.
